__description: Product reviews for SQL review_logs table, grouped by product. Mirrors teammate's review_mock_data.json structure. seed_demo.py flattens reviews_list into individual ReviewLog rows: customer.username_masked → customer_name, ai_analysis.sentiment + key_aspects → ai_insight. v2.1 adds top-level sentiment/key_issue/sentiment_tag fields that map directly to ReviewLog columns for sentiment stats UI.

review_logs.product_id: <string: must match a product_id in products.json>

reviews_list.review_id: <string: unique, e.g. REV_001 — upsert key in review_merge_data.py>
reviews_list.sentiment: <string: 'Tích cực' | 'Bình thường' | 'Tiêu cực' — maps to ReviewLog.sentiment>
reviews_list.key_issue: <string: core issue in ≤ 8 words, or 'Không có vấn đề' — maps to ReviewLog.key_issue>
reviews_list.sentiment_tag: <string: short label ≤ 4 words for UI tag display — maps to ReviewLog.sentiment_tag>
